excerpt: The official programme page for MA in English (Applied English Linguistics) lists 1st round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2025-11-19. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 19 November 2025 2nd round: 31 December 2025 We will review applications as they are received and continue until all available places are filled. Therefore, applying early is strongly recommended.
